actions.intent: Start with a low-risk route-support clear.
Break the central ice and reveal the rescue payoff.
Open the right side of the puppy.
Use a clean side clear to keep the board generous.
Preserve dock room before the extraction sequence.
Use refreshed upper material as a recovery beat.
Finish the thawed route and extract the puppy.

notes: Designer golden for the post-pressure ice payoff: break ice early and enjoy a forgiving rescue finish.
